explanations.pt-br: Importa o cliente OpenAI para chamar a API.
explanations.en-us: Imports the OpenAI client to call the API.

explanations.pt-br: Inicializa o cliente OpenAI com as variáveis de ambiente.
explanations.en-us: Initializes the OpenAI client with environment variables.

explanations.pt-br: Chamada com prompt vago - resulta em resposta genérica.
explanations.en-us: Call with vague prompt - results in a generic response.

explanations.pt-br: Prompt específico com contexto, analogia e requisitos claros.
explanations.en-us: Specific prompt with context, analogy, and clear requirements.

explanations.pt-br: Compara os primeiros 50 caracteres de cada resposta.
explanations.en-us: Compares the first 50 characters of each response.
